blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,024 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 38".
